name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Stylish UV protection sunglasses perfect for summer outings. These wrap-around shades block 100% of harmful UV rays and come with a scratch-resistant coating. Lightweight frame fits all face shapes.

name: Floral Maxi Dress
description: Lightweight and breathable floral maxi dress ideal for beach walks and summer parties. Made from 100% cotton with a flowy silhouette and adjustable straps.

name: SPF 50 Sunscreen Lotion
description: Broad-spectrum SPF 50 sunscreen that protects against UVA and UVB rays. Water-resistant formula lasts up to 80 minutes. Non-greasy, dermatologist tested for all skin types.

name: Inflatable Beach Float
description: Giant inflatable flamingo beach float, perfect for pool parties and beach days. Durable vinyl material supports up to 200 lbs. Comes with a repair patch kit.

name: Wide Brim Sun Hat
description: Elegant wide brim straw hat with UPF 50+ protection. Adjustable inner band fits head sizes 54-60cm. Foldable design makes it easy to pack for travel.

name: Cooling Beach Towel
description: Quick-dry microfiber beach towel with cooling technology. Extra large 70x140cm size, sand-free material that shakes clean instantly. Comes with a carrying bag.

name: Waterproof Sandals
description: Comfortable waterproof sandals with anti-slip sole, perfect for beach and water activities. Adjustable straps for custom fit. Available in sizes 6–12.

name: Portable Beach Umbrella
description: Lightweight 7ft beach umbrella with UV50+ protection. Wind-resistant design with tilt adjustment. Includes sand anchor and carry bag. Sets up in under 60 seconds.
